issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.
The skill relies on the Python Haystack library, assuming a Python runtime and may not work on non-Python agents.

scenarios.name: RAG pipeline with indexing and query stages
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Haystack's Pipeline class with separate indexing and query pipelines, OpenAIDocumentEmbedder/OpenAITextEmbedder, InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever, PromptBuilder, OpenAIGenerator, and connects components with explicit pipeline.connect() including embedder.embedding to retriever.query_embedding; baseline reaches for a generic LangChain-style chain or hand-rolled cosine similarity, missing the pipeline-as-code primitives.

scenarios.name: Custom metadata filter component
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the @component decorator with @component.output_types(documents=list[Document]) and a run(documents, category) method returning a dict, matching the documented custom component shape; baseline writes a plain Python function that won't slot into a Haystack pipeline.
